Listing 9.12 Mounting an individual file into a container

spec:
 containers:
 - name: my-container
 volumeMounts:
 - name: my-volume
 subPath: my-app.conf 
 mountPath: /etc/my-app.conf 
Instead of mounting the 
entire volume, you mount 
only the my-app.conf file.
Since you're mounting a single 
file, the mountPath needs to 
specify the file path.
UNDERSTANDING THE CONFIGMAP VOLUME'S USE OF SYMBOLIC LINKS FOR ATOMIC UPDATES
